Metadata.Title: CVE-2026-34353 affecting package ocaml for versions less than 5.1.1-2
Metadata.Description: CVE-2026-34353 affecting package ocaml for versions less than 5.1.1-2. An upgraded version of the package is available that resolves this issue.

Criterion.Comment: Package ocaml is earlier than 5.1.1-2, affected by CVE-2026-34353
